cards.content: I build quite some web projects. Possibly too much. One important part of actually putting them out there is to create some decent looking screenshots.

cards.title: This is usually quite tedious
cards.content: Tools like [photopea](https://www.photopea.com/) and [screenshot.rocks](https://screenshot.rocks/) help, but it's still a tedium, and complex tools also invite you to spend quite some time on it.

My current solution is this [mockup webapp](https://wrapper.koljasam.com/)

![](../media/img/the-mission-to-mockup-screenshots/wrapper.webp)

It's decent, but it lacks one important feature: Placing multiple screenshots.
